name: pi-references
description: Pi extension that adds OpenCode-style references: local directories and Git repositories as agent context.

scripts.fmt: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json src test
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json src test
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm test
